Premium landscape design that reflects your vision and enhances your property value

Premium Landscaping Services

From concept to completion, we deliver exceptional outdoor spaces tailored to your lifestyle and property needs.

🎨

Landscape Design

Custom landscape architecture and design services that blend aesthetic beauty with functional outdoor living spaces.

  • • Site analysis and planning
  • • 3D design visualization
  • • Plant selection and placement
  • • Hardscape integration
🏗️

Installation & Construction

Expert installation of landscapes, hardscapes, and outdoor living features with meticulous attention to detail.

  • • Professional installation
  • • Irrigation systems
  • • Hardscape construction
  • • Lighting installation
🌿

Maintenance & Care

Ongoing maintenance programs to keep your landscape investment looking pristine year-round.

  • • Seasonal maintenance
  • • Pruning and trimming
  • • Fertilization programs
  • • Pest management

Coastal landscape design

Coastal Oasis Creation

Oceanfront property featuring salt-tolerant plants, natural stone work, and infinity pool integration.

Crafting Excellence Since 1998

For over 25 years, GreenScape Pro has been the trusted choice for discerning property owners who demand nothing but the finest in landscape design and installation.

Our team of certified landscape architects and horticulturists brings unparalleled expertise to every project, ensuring that your outdoor space not only meets but exceeds your highest expectations.

500+

Projects Completed

25+

Years Experience

Our Commitment

  • ✓Licensed and insured professionals
  • ✓Sustainable and eco-friendly practices
  • ✓100% satisfaction guarantee
  • ✓Ongoing support and maintenance
